meaning: adj.(蜩ｺ荵ｳ蜉ｨ迚ｩ蜻ｼ蜷ｸ邉ｻ扈滉ｸｭ)鮟剰̻郤､豈帷噪
examples: Objective To explore a scientifical method to research human mucociliary system.
Objective: To study the effects of nitrofurazone and ephedrine nasal drops on mucociliary transport function in children.
Objective: to explore the effect of hypertonic saline on nasal mucociliary clearance in patients with chronic rhinosinusitis.
